title: A New Leader for the Money Bank
summary: The White House has chosen Kevin Warsh to be the next leader of the Federal Reserve, which is like the big bank for the United States. He used to work there before. The Senate, a group in the government, needs to say yes to this choice. But one senator, Thom Tillis, says no because there is a problem with the current leader, Jerome Powell. Kevin Warsh has said the Federal Reserve made some mistakes with money rules, like keeping interest rates too low, which made prices go up fast. Now, he wants lower rates because he thinks new technology called artificial intelligence will help the economy grow without making prices rise. Other leaders at the Federal Reserve do not all agree with him. The Senate will talk about this and vote to decide if Kevin Warsh gets the job.

keywords.explanation: the place where the President of the United States lives and works
the big bank that helps control money in the United States
a part of the government that makes laws and approves choices like leaders
the cost of borrowing money, which affects how much people spend and save
smart computer technology that can do tasks like thinking
how money and jobs work in a country

questions.question: Who did the White House choose to lead the Federal Reserve?
What group needs to approve Kevin Warsh's choice?
Why does Senator Thom Tillis say no to Kevin Warsh?
options: He does not like Kevin Warsh
There is a problem with Jerome Powell
He thinks artificial intelligence is bad
questions.correct_answer: There is a problem with Jerome Powell

questions.question: What did Kevin Warsh say about the Federal Reserve's past money rules?
options: They made prices go up fast
questions.correct_answer: They made prices go up fast

questions.question: What does Kevin Warsh think will help the economy grow without making prices rise?
Do all Federal Reserve leaders agree with Kevin Warsh about artificial intelligence?

background_read: The Federal Reserve is like the country's main bank. It decides how much money costs to borrow, which affects things like prices and jobs. Leaders are chosen by the President and approved by the Senate. Sometimes, people disagree on the best rules for money.
Article_Structure: WHO: Kevin Warsh, the White House, the Senate, and Federal Reserve leaders
WHAT: Choosing a new leader for the Federal Reserve and discussing money rules
WHERE: Washington, D.C., in the United States
WHY: To decide who will control money and interest rates to help the economy

perspectives.description: Some people think he will make good money rules to help the economy grow.
Others worry about problems with the current leader or disagree with his ideas on interest rates.
